name: Patient 21
history: Family conflict with dismissive father; estranged. Stress with partner's family, including difficult sister-in-law.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: Setting boundaries will cause conflict and rejection.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm doomed to have difficult family relationships.
situation: Deciding how to address rude behavior from partner's sister-in-law and whether to set boundaries.
auto_thought: "If I say something, everyone will hate me. I should just tolerate it."
behavior: Smiles through rude comment, changes subject, later complains to partner privately.
